root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.member_group_no,tab.membership_no) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, (CASE lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) WHEN sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) as memname, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , ROUND(coalesce(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance,0)/coalesce(sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount,1),0) as period_balance
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.coll_resign= '1' ) ) and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type not in ('1','3','9') ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0 ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ASC, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ASC )tab

r_coll_resign_by_memno_total_nest_coll.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code, (CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code WHEN '0' THEN '' ELSE pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) END) as resignation_approve_date,
sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resign_code, (select sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resign_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code) as resign_name, (CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code WHEN '0' THEN PKB_KTM.fp_get_collpermit_balance( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) ELSE 0 END) as c_coll, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as coll_group_no FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) ) ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code DESC, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ASC

r_coll_resign_by_memno_total_nest_loan.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'DD/MM/YYYY' ) as begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , ROUND(coalesce(sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance,0)/coalesce(sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount,1),0) as period_balance
from sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} order by (CASE trim( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) WHEN '2' THEN 1 WHEN '6' THEN 1 END) , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type
